{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Dead Mother's heart
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Dead Mother's heart]] is not the only one.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“This is not the Dead Mother's only heart.”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
